C

ClienteClient - Interface in co.edu.unbosque.venta.feign
Feign client for communicating with the Client microservice.
ClienteDTO - Class in co.edu.unbosque.venta.dto
Data Transfer Object representing a client (Cliente).
ClienteDTO() - Constructor for class co.edu.unbosque.venta.dto.ClienteDTO
Default constructor
ClienteDTO(Long, Long, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class co.edu.unbosque.venta.dto.ClienteDTO
Parameterized constructor to create a ClienteDTO instance.
co.edu.unbosque.venta - package co.edu.unbosque.venta
Package containing the main entry point for the Venta microservice.
co.edu.unbosque.venta.controller - package co.edu.unbosque.venta.controller
Package containing REST controllers for managing sale details (DetalleVenta) and related operations in the sales(Venta) management system.
co.edu.unbosque.venta.dto - package co.edu.unbosque.venta.dto
Package containing Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) used for transferring data between layers and microservices in the sales management system.
co.edu.unbosque.venta.feign - package co.edu.unbosque.venta.feign
Package containing Feign client interfaces used for communication with external microservices in the sales system.
co.edu.unbosque.venta.model - package co.edu.unbosque.venta.model
Package containing model classes (entities) used for the sales management system.
co.edu.unbosque.venta.repository - package co.edu.unbosque.venta.repository
Package containing repository interfaces responsible for managing database access operations related to sales entities.
co.edu.unbosque.venta.service - package co.edu.unbosque.venta.service
Package containing service classes responsible for handling business logic related to sales management, including creation of sales, interaction with external services, and generation of sales reports and invoices.
crear(DetalleVenta) - Method in class co.edu.unbosque.venta.controller.DetalleVentaController
Creates a new sale detail.
crear(DetalleVenta) - Method in class co.edu.unbosque.venta.service.DetalleVentaService
Creates a new sale detail record.
crear(Venta) - Method in class co.edu.unbosque.venta.controller.VentaController
Creates a new sale (Venta).
crear(Venta) - Method in class co.edu.unbosque.venta.service.VentaService
Creates a new sale and calculates all financial values such as subtotal, VAT (IVA), and total.
crear(T) - Method in interface co.edu.unbosque.venta.service.CRUDOperations
Create a new record for the given entity.
CRUDOperations<T> - Interface in co.edu.unbosque.venta.service
Generic interface defining basic CRUD operations that service classes implement for their corresponding domain entities.
